2295770.name: PERISH Soundtrack
2295770.description: The original soundtrack to the thrilling 1-4 player co-op first-person shooter PERISH not only reflects the darkly exciting mood of the game but is a true gem for devotees to the instrumental metal and djent scene. This album features relentless shredding of extended-range guitars across more than 20 tracks. And the best part: It was composed and recorded by the developers of PERISH themselves. So it's safe to say: The passion is real.
